name: sugar-pep-bootstrap-verifier

acceptedTools.name: recompute-spec-cids
acceptedTools.purpose: Recompute spec CIDs and candidate catalog CID.

acceptedTools.name: compute_fixture_cid
acceptedTools.purpose: Recompute JCS-based CIDs for catalog snapshots and PEP JSON bodies.

acceptedManualAssertions: v1.6.4 adds exactly two new catalog properties (pattern-predicate-protocol and contract-composition-protocol); no existing property is modified or removed.
PPP names how an editorially-defined bug class compiles to a content-addressed substrate query whose result-set delta discharges an FRP receipt's policy; the protocol is draft and extension-only.
CCP names canonical contract composition over the existing handshake tier 2 cache and its FFI/CLI/direct-link binding modes; the protocol is draft and extension-only.
No language kit must change emitted ProofIR, canonicalization, all-layer lifting, proof-file format, or cross-kit conformance fixture values to remain v1.6.4 compatible.
